function.message: I could not complete this inbox request because one explicitly listed file path is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_06__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md`. I processed discovery for all listed items, but per the inbox rules I must handle exactly the listed set and cannot do a partial OCR/update. Please confirm the correct 5th path (or add the missing file), and I can complete all items in one pass.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied identity bootstrap, read relevant workflow/schema docs before task work, treated inbox explicit file list as authoritative, and avoided partial mutation when required input was missing.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because the inbox task explicitly requires OCR of 5 exact file paths from `00_inbox/724_next-task.md`, and one exact path is absent. The missing file could not be read and was additionally confirmed absent via search (0 matches), so completing the requested set would require guessing/substitution.
